hero.title: Premium Wild-Caught Seafood from Argentina to the World
hero.subtitle: B2B export and wholesale distribution carrying the highest international standards of freshness, quality, and guaranteed traceability.

whyUs.title: Why Choose Ull Yasan?
whyUs.subtitle: Leading the export of premium wild seafood from the cold South Atlantic with operational excellence and commercial integrity.

traceability.title: Full Traceability
traceability.description: Rigorous monitoring at every stage, from selective wild harvesting in the cold South Atlantic waters to final delivery.

quality.title: Premium Quality
quality.description: State-of-the-art sea-freezing processes and processing facilities fully certified under strict international standards.

logistics.title: Global Logistics
logistics.description: Continuous cold chain security and expert customs support for seamless shipping to European, Asian, and American ports.

experience.title: B2B Strategic Partner
experience.description: Flexible commercial terms and personalized service for premium restaurant groups, hotel chains, and major importers.

categories.title: Our Categories
categories.subtitle: Explore our B2B export range classified by processing and preservation methods.
categories.frozenDesc: Seafood frozen immediately using IQF or Block technology, preserving original texture, flavor, and rich nutritional value.
categories.freshDesc: Carefully selected landings dispatched via airfreight to guarantee maximum freshness at destination.

catalog.title: B2B Export Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Premium selection of wild-caught South Atlantic seafood for global distribution.

footer.tagline: Patagonian quality, freshness, and trust served to the world's most demanding markets.

seo.homeDesc: Argentine wholesale distributor and exporter of premium Patagonian seafood. Supplying premium importers, restaurant chains, and distributors worldwide.
